# StudyFetch - The Top AI Learning Platform

## Features  
**StudyFetch** offers a comprehensive suite of AI-driven study tools that turn course materials into interactive learning aids. Key features include: 

- **Notes AI** – Automatically generates detailed or summarized notes from uploaded course content (PDFs, PowerPoints, lecture videos, etc.) ([Notes AI | StudyFetch | The Best AI tools for Learning |  StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/en/features/notes#:~:text=Detailed%20Notes)) ([Notes AI | StudyFetch | The Best AI tools for Learning |  StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/en/features/notes#:~:text=Our%20AI%20technology%20excels%20in,PDFs%2C%20PowerPoints%2C%20and%20Lecture%20Videos)).  
- **Flashcards AI** – Creates flashcards from your study material with a single click ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Notes%20AI%20Create%20notes%20from,your%20course%20material%20in%20seconds)), enabling quick review of key terms and concepts.  
- **Quizzes AI** – Produces practice quizzes and tests based on the uploaded content ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Flashcards%20AI%20Make%20flashcards%20from,material%20with%20a%20single%20click)), allowing students to self-assess their understanding.  
- **Spark.E AI Tutor** – A 24/7 personal AI tutor (a friendly dog-themed assistant) that answers questions in real time and guides learning ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Quizzes%20AI%20Create%20and%20practice,quizzes%20from%20your%20course%20material)) ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=StudyFetch%27s%20AI%2C%20Spark,time%20queries)). Students can chat with Spark.E to get explanations, ask for help on any part of their study set, and even receive feedback on their progress.  
- **Spark.E Visuals** – Enables students to ask questions about images or diagrams from their notes ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Spark,and%20learn%20in%20real%20time)), helping clarify visual materials.  
- **Record Live Lecture** – Transcribes and takes notes on live lectures in real-time ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Spark,and%20learn%20in%20real%20time)). This feature lets students capture lecture content (even up to hour-long lectures ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=,whole%20class%20lecture%20to%20StudyFetch))) without manual note-taking, and ask questions as the lecture progresses.  
- **Essay Grader** – An AI tool that evaluates written essays and provides personalized feedback and suggestions for improvement ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=touching%20your%20computer%21)). This helps students refine their writing and understand grading criteria.  
- **Tutor Me** – Generates a full lesson or lecture on the uploaded course material ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Essay%20Grader%20Grade%20your%20essays,get%20personalized%20feedback%20and%20suggestions)). Essentially, Spark.E can teach an entire topic back to the student in a structured way, reinforcing understanding.  
- **Call with Spark.E** – Offers an interactive voice call experience with the AI tutor ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Tutor%20Me%20Get%20taught%20an,E)). Students can discuss their study material verbally, simulating a tutoring session.  
- **Audio Recap** – Produces an audio summary (like a 6–45 minute podcast or lecture recap) of the study materials ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Call%20with%20Spark,to%20discuss%20your%20study%20material)). This allows students to review content by listening, which is useful for auditory learners or on-the-go study.  
- **Explainer Video** – Generates an educational video explanation of the material using AI ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Audio%20Recap%20Generate%20a%206,summary%20from%20your%20study%20materials)). This turns notes or topics into a visual lesson video for better engagement.  
- **Study Calendar** – An AI-powered planner that helps students schedule study sessions and meet academic goals ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=study%20materials)). It creates personalized study plans and reminders to keep students on track.

## Enterprise Offerings  
For schools, universities, and large organizations, StudyFetch provides enterprise-level services to support deployment at scale: 

- **Institution-Wide Integration** – An **Enterprise Plan** is available for high-grade institutions, allowing the platform to be hosted on a **private server** for the school or organization ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Key%20Features%20of%20Enterprise%20Enterprise)). This ensures that sensitive academic data remains secure and isolated.  
- **Advanced AI & Custom Models** – Enterprise clients get access to upgraded AI intelligence with improved reasoning capabilities ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image)). StudyFetch can even utilize multiple large language models (LLMs) with custom guardrails to maximize accuracy in responses ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20LLM%20Icon)), tailoring the AI solution to the institution’s specific needs ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Use%20multiple%20LLMs%2C%20guardrails%2C%20and,tailored%20to%20your%20institutions%20needs)).  
- **Enhanced Safety Controls** – Customized safety settings allow administrators to enforce appropriate use. StudyFetch offers strict guardrails to prevent misuse (e.g. it’s *“designed for learning, not cheating”* ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20AI%20Learning))) and can configure the AI’s behavior to align with school policies. Institutions have **total control** over how the platform is used in classrooms on a case-by-case basis ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=information%20without%20being%20fed%20answers)).  
- **Data Security & Compliance** – The enterprise version is built with **enterprise-grade security** to meet education compliance standards ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=What%20your%20Institution%20gets)). StudyFetch Enterprise is **COPPA, FERPA, and EdSafe AI** compliant ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=A%20Leader%20in%20AI%20Safety)), ensuring student data privacy and safety in an institutional setting. All data is handled securely with robust encryption and protection measures ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=When%20it%20comes%20to%20AI%2C,the%20platform%20safe%20and%20trustworthy)). (Compliance features are available exclusively on Enterprise plans ([StudyFetch | AI For Teachers](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/teacher#:~:text=Image%3A%20COPPA%20Compliance%20%2056Image%3A,FERPA%20Compliance)).)  
- **Analytics & Insights** – Provides deep analytics dashboards for educators and administrators. For example, it can show what topics students struggle with via the AI Teaching Assistant’s interactions ([StudyFetch | AI For Teachers](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/teacher#:~:text=Analytics)), and offer insights into student engagement, performance, and progress over time ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Advanced%20Analytics)). These analytics help educators tailor their teaching and measure the impact of StudyFetch.  
- **Custom Branding** – The platform can be white-labeled with the institution’s own branding on a private subdomain ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image)). This seamless integration into the school’s environment helps with adoption and maintains a consistent user experience for students.  
- **Priority Support** – Enterprise customers receive dedicated account management and priority support ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image)). StudyFetch’s team provides hands-on assistance, training, and troubleshooting to ensure successful implementation across the institution.  
- **Additional Features** – Some extra capabilities are available for enterprise-level use, such as support for **handwritten notes and photo uploads** (so students can upload pictures of notes or boards) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image)), and faster AI response times due to enhanced infrastructure ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image)). These features contribute to a smoother, more powerful learning experience at scale.

## Institutions  
StudyFetch actively works with educational institutions to enhance learning outcomes and integrate AI safely into the curriculum. Many students already use StudyFetch on their own, so institutions are partnering with StudyFetch to officially bring it into classrooms. Notable points about StudyFetch’s collaboration with schools and universities include:

- **Widespread Student Adoption** – Even before official partnerships, over **10,000 US higher-ed institutions** have students who use the consumer version of StudyFetch ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=10%2C000%2B)). The platform’s popularity among students means schools can leverage a tool that learners are already familiar with and enthusiastic about. In fact, StudyFetch’s reach has grown rapidly, with more than **100 million people** seeing StudyFetch content on social media in a 90-day period ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=StudyFetch)), signaling broad interest.  
- **Integration into LMS & Classes** – StudyFetch can be integrated into the institution’s existing systems. Educators can embed the StudyFetch AI Teaching Assistant directly into Learning Management Systems like Canvas, so students can access it within their regular class portals ([StudyFetch | AI For Teachers](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/teacher#:~:text=Allows%20students%20to%20interact%20with,you%20when%20you%27re%20not%20available)). Faculty and administrators have control to enable or restrict the AI tutor’s use per class, ensuring it complements the course appropriately ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=information%20without%20being%20fed%20answers)). This approach helps align the tool with each instructor’s teaching plan, rather than circumventing it.  
- **Supporting Classroom Instruction** – The platform is positioned as a supplemental aid that reinforces what is taught in class. StudyFetch emphasizes that students learn *“exactly what you’re teaching”* by creating study materials from the instructor’s own content ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20an%20engaging%20AI,learn%20exactly%20what%20you%27re%20teaching)). This means when an institution adopts StudyFetch, the AI will reinforce the curriculum, not introduce random outside content. By personalizing practice and review based on course materials, it gives students an extra boost at home on the same topics covered in class ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20an%20engaging%20AI,learn%20exactly%20what%20you%27re%20teaching)). Teachers can thus use it to extend learning beyond lecture hours, confident that it’s on-topic.  
- **Positive Learning Outcomes** – Institutions have seen improved student performance with StudyFetch. Internal data indicates the vast majority of students using StudyFetch achieved grade improvements (over 84% improved or maintained grades) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=84.79)) and significant reductions in study time needed ([StudyFetch | AI For Teachers](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/teacher#:~:text=Image%3A%20feature)). By providing on-demand help, the AI tutor ensures students don’t get stuck late at night when instructors aren’t available ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=Today%27s%20college%20students%20face%20an,get%20introduced%20into%20your%20life)). Schools interested in boosting student success and study efficiency consider these outcomes promising.  
- **Custom Solutions** – StudyFetch works closely with institutions to tailor the platform to their needs. For example, they can deploy custom AI models or adjust the content scope for a particular program ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20LLM%20Icon)). Institutions are encouraged to contact StudyFetch for enterprise solutions ([StudyFetch Partners with Canvas by Instructure - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-canvas-by-instructure#:~:text=If%20you%E2%80%99re%20an%20educator%20looking,for%20enterprise%20at%20%2020)), indicating a collaborative approach to onboarding. This could include pilot programs, training sessions for teachers on how to use the tools, and ensuring that institutional guidelines (like academic integrity policies) are upheld within the platform ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Institutional%20Alignment)).  
- **Encouraging Responsible AI Use** – A big part of StudyFetch’s institutional collaboration is educating about proper use of AI in education. Schools often worry about AI being used to cheat or do work for students, so StudyFetch has positioned itself as an **ally** to educators by focusing on *AI literacy*. They stress teaching students how to use AI positively and not negatively ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=AI%20Designed%20for%20learning%2C%20not,cheating)). By integrating with institutions, StudyFetch can be part of the conversation on responsible AI use in academia, helping shape guidelines and providing tools (like the cheating detection feature) that align with academic integrity.

## Partners  
StudyFetch has formed key partnerships and collaborations to enhance its platform and expand its reach in the education technology ecosystem:

- **Canvas by Instructure** – *In June 2024, StudyFetch announced a partnership with Canvas*, one of the leading Learning Management Systems used by schools and universities ([StudyFetch Partners with Canvas by Instructure - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-canvas-by-instructure#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20proud%20to%20partner,with%20Canvas%20by%20Instructure)). This integration makes it easy for educators and students on Canvas to access StudyFetch’s AI tools directly within their LMS environment. The collaboration with Instructure (Canvas’s parent company) connects StudyFetch’s AI capabilities with a platform that supports over 30 million learners worldwide ([StudyFetch Partners with Canvas by Instructure - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-canvas-by-instructure#:~:text=About%20Instructure)), indicating a significant step in distribution.  
- **D2L Brightspace** – *In September 2024, StudyFetch partnered with D2L*, the company behind the Brightspace LMS ([StudyFetch Partners with D2L Brightspace to Integrate AI Learning Tools with Brightspace - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-d2l-brightspace-to-integrate-ai-learning-tools-with-brightspace#:~:text=StudyFetch%20Partners%20with%20D2L%20Brightspace,AI%20Learning%20Tools%20with%20Brightspace)) ([StudyFetch Partners with D2L Brightspace to Integrate AI Learning Tools with Brightspace - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-d2l-brightspace-to-integrate-ai-learning-tools-with-brightspace#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20happy%20to%20announce,makes%20the%20Brightspace%20learning%20platform)). Through this partnership, StudyFetch’s tools integrate with Brightspace, allowing seamless use of AI study aids alongside regular coursework on that platform. This move brings AI-driven learning to more students and teachers, offering extra help to students and new support tools for instructors within Brightspace ([StudyFetch Partners with D2L Brightspace to Integrate AI Learning Tools with Brightspace - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-d2l-brightspace-to-integrate-ai-learning-tools-with-brightspace#:~:text=StudyFetch%27s%20AI%20learning%20tools%20will,learning%20alongside%20their%20usual%20coursework)).  
- **Wolfram Alpha** – *In October 2024, StudyFetch teamed up with Wolfram*, the leader in computational math engines. By integrating **Wolfram|Alpha** into Spark.E (the AI tutor), StudyFetch enhanced its ability to handle advanced math and science queries ([StudyFetch Partners with Wolfram to Add Advanced Math Tools to AI Tutor Spark.E - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-wolfram-to-add-advanced-math-tools-to-ai-tutor-spark-e#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20excited%20to%20announce,engine%20into%20the%20StudyFetch%20platform)) ([StudyFetch Partners with Wolfram to Add Advanced Math Tools to AI Tutor Spark.E - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-wolfram-to-add-advanced-math-tools-to-ai-tutor-spark-e#:~:text=While%20our%20AI%20tutor%20Spark,leading%20researchers%20and%20institutions%20worldwide)). Wolfram’s powerful computation ensures that when students ask math-related questions, the answers and step-by-step solutions are mathematically precise. This partnership enables features like solving calculus problems, visualizing 3D graphs, and checking complex equations directly within StudyFetch’s interface ([StudyFetch Partners with Wolfram to Add Advanced Math Tools to AI Tutor Spark.E - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-wolfram-to-add-advanced-math-tools-to-ai-tutor-spark-e#:~:text=computational%20intelligence%20trusted%20by%20leading,researchers%20and%20institutions%20worldwide)) – all with the goal of strengthening the tutor’s expertise in STEM subjects.  
- **Anthropic (Claude AI)** – StudyFetch has also collaborated with AI research companies to power its platform. Notably, StudyFetch chose **Anthropic’s Claude** as a core AI model driving Spark.E from the very start ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=Choosing%20Claude%20for%20intelligence%20and,natural%20interaction)). Anthropic has highlighted StudyFetch as a case study for Claude’s implementation in education, noting that StudyFetch serves *“millions of students globally”* using Claude and supports 20+ languages ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%20uses%20Claude%20to%20transform,support%20in%20over%2020%20languages)). By working closely with Anthropic, StudyFetch benefits from Claude’s natural language abilities and ongoing improvements; for example, upgrading to newer versions of Claude improved user satisfaction and accuracy of responses on the platform ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=With%20Claude%2C%20StudyFetch%20achieved%3A)) ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%27s%20commitment%20to%20Claude%20has,powered%20education)). This partnership ensures StudyFetch stays at the cutting edge of AI tech.  
- **Other Alliances** – In addition to the above, StudyFetch is engaging with the broader ed-tech community. It appears in Microsoft’s AppSource/Azure Marketplace as a recognized educational product ([Microsoft Azure Marketplace](https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/es-es/marketplace/apps/studyfetch.bee26d0c-e072-4c87-8fa8-1bb0081bdd1a?tab=overview#:~:text=The%20all,platform%20in%20Education)) ([Microsoft Azure Marketplace](https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/es-es/marketplace/apps/studyfetch.bee26d0c-e072-4c87-8fa8-1bb0081bdd1a?tab=overview#:~:text=StudyFetch%20works,more%20with%20a%20single%20click)), suggesting a collaboration with Microsoft’s ecosystem for easier deployment in organizations. The platform also indicates compliance with standards from groups like **EdSafe AI Alliance** (for safe/appropriate AI in education) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=A%20Leader%20in%20AI%20Safety)), though compliance is not a partnership per se, it reflects working alongside industry initiatives to uphold safety norms.

## Integrations  
StudyFetch is designed to work with a variety of third-party systems and content sources, making it flexible for users to import material and use the AI tools in their existing workflows:

- **Learning Management Systems (LMS)** – StudyFetch integrates with popular LMS platforms used by schools. It has official integrations for **Canvas** and **D2L Brightspace**, as evidenced by their partnerships ([StudyFetch Partners with Canvas by Instructure - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-canvas-by-instructure#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20proud%20to%20partner,with%20Canvas%20by%20Instructure)) ([StudyFetch Partners with D2L Brightspace to Integrate AI Learning Tools with Brightspace - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-d2l-brightspace-to-integrate-ai-learning-tools-with-brightspace#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20happy%20to%20announce,makes%20the%20Brightspace%20learning%20platform)). Educators can embed StudyFetch features into these systems, allowing students to access AI-generated study aids from within their regular course pages. The integration typically involves adding StudyFetch as an external tool or assistant in the LMS, streamlining login and access through the institution’s system ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Non%20intrusive%20Login%20Setup)). This means less friction – students can use Spark.E and generate study content without leaving the LMS they already use daily.  
- **Content Import** – The platform supports uploading a wide range of content formats. Users can import **PDF, Word, PowerPoint, text files, images (PNG/JPEG)**, audio (MP3), video files (MP4), and even **YouTube links** ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=,material%20can%20I%20upload)). Additionally, StudyFetch can pull in documents from **Google Docs** and even lecture content directly from **Canvas** exports ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=,material%20can%20I%20upload)). A blog post notes that StudyFetch can ingest material from **Quizlet** as well ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=The%20Benefits%20of%20StudyFetch%3A%20An,Posted%20on%209%2F13%2F2023)) – suggesting students can bring their existing flashcard sets or other resources into StudyFetch. This broad compatibility means students and teachers aren’t limited; virtually any study material can be turned into an AI study session.  
- **Browser Extension & Apps** – While not explicitly detailed in the above sources, StudyFetch maintains a presence on different platforms (for instance, they have an iOS app ([StudyFetch on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/study-fetch/id6663574866#:~:text=Study%20Fetch%20on%20the%20App,more%20to%20boost%20your)) and mention of being available on mobile and computers ([Taking the Academic World by Storm: StudyFetch Transforms Course Material Into Flashcards and Quizzes - King Newswire](https://kingnewswire.com/taking-the-academic-world-by-storm-studyfetch-transforms-course-material-into-flashcards-and-quizzes-2302162503/#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20also%20available%20on,out%20of%20the%20StudyFetch%20experience))). This likely includes browser-based integrations or extensions that facilitate adding content to StudyFetch. For example, a Chrome extension might allow one-click importing of a webpage or LMS content into StudyFetch (the TikTok references in search results suggest a Chrome extension for D2L quizzes ([How to Ace Quizzes Using Mindtap Cengage - TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/discover/how-to-ace-quizzes-using-mindtap-cengage#:~:text=How%20to%20Ace%20Quizzes%20Using,6K))). These integrations make it easier for users to send material to StudyFetch for analysis without manually downloading and uploading files.  
- **Single Sign-On (SSO)** – For institutions, StudyFetch can integrate with existing login systems. Schools can whitelist email domains or use SSO so that students and staff can log in with their school credentials ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Non%20intrusive%20Login%20Setup)). This enterprise integration ensures a smooth onboarding (students don’t have to create new accounts separately) and aligns with IT policies for user management.  
- **APIs and Developer Hooks** – Although not explicitly covered in our sources, given the presence on Azure Marketplace and the nature of enterprise software, StudyFetch may offer API access or developer integration capabilities. This could allow other educational software or websites to hook into StudyFetch’s engine (for instance, to generate flashcards or summaries via API). However, details would likely be provided on request to partners, as the publicly highlighted integrations revolve around user-facing LMS and content ingestion.

Overall, StudyFetch’s integrations focus on *meeting students and educators where they already are*: whether it’s within a course site, a document platform, or a study app, ensuring StudyFetch can plug in easily and augment existing study routines ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=The%20Benefits%20of%20StudyFetch%3A%20An,Posted%20on%209%2F13%2F2023)).

## Founders  
StudyFetch was founded in 2023 by **Ryan Trattner** and **Esan Durrani**, who serve as the company’s co-founders ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=experiencing%20a%20massive%20amount%20of,style%20search%20and%20answering%20usage)) ([StudyFetch, 24/7 AI Tutor That Teaches You Your Course Material - Daily Emerald](http://dailyemerald.com/100577/promotedposts/studyfetch-24-7-ai-tutor-that-teaches-you-your-course-material/#:~:text=Finals%20stress%3F%20Forget%20about%20it%2C,Simply%20just%20upload%20your%20presentation)). Both founders have backgrounds in technology and education, bringing experience that has helped shape StudyFetch into a leading ed-tech platform ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=experiencing%20a%20massive%20amount%20of,style%20search%20and%20answering%20usage)). 

- **Esan Durrani** – Co-founder and CEO of StudyFetch ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=Today%27s%20college%20students%20face%20an,get%20introduced%20into%20your%20life)). Esan has been the public face in articulating the vision of the platform. He identified the challenges students face in finding help outside of class hours and has emphasized the need for an AI tutor that provides *“instant, personalized support”* to learners anytime ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=Traditional%20study%20methods%2C%20built%20around,side%E2%80%94to%20answer%20any%20question%E2%80%94becomes%20critical)). Under his leadership, StudyFetch has focused on creating a comprehensive learning experience (not just a quick answer bot), where students spend time genuinely understanding material ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%20recognized%20that%20solving%20this,while%20providing%20instant%2C%20personalized%20support)). Esan’s insights, likely drawn from his own academic and technical experience, guided the development of Spark.E to ensure it feels like a natural, friendly tutor rather than a robotic tool ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%20chose%20to%20build%20their,and%20natural%E2%80%94not%20like%20a%20robot)). He also often speaks about the mission to make education accessible – for example, stressing that StudyFetch should complement teachers and be available to all students, not just a few ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=with%20their%20studies)) ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=Unlike%20traditional%20tutoring%20which%20can,tutoring%2C%20and%20receive%20personalized%20support)).  
- **Ryan Trattner** – Co-founder of StudyFetch (role often described alongside Esan; sometimes simply noted as “of StudyFetch”). Ryan has been instrumental in building the platform and advocating for its educational philosophy. In interviews, Ryan highlights the importance of **safety, affordability, and effectiveness**. He has reassured parents and educators that StudyFetch prioritizes security and academic integrity, implementing strong encryption and anti-cheating protocols to maintain trust ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=When%20it%20comes%20to%20AI%2C,the%20platform%20safe%20and%20trustworthy)). Ryan also emphasizes the goal of keeping StudyFetch **accessible** – noting that traditional tutoring can be too expensive, he stated *“StudyFetch is designed to be both effective and affordable…a high-quality educational tool that’s accessible to everyone.”* ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=%E2%80%9CStudyFetch%20is%20designed%20to%20be,%E2%80%9D)). This reflects his contribution to ensuring the platform can reach students of varying backgrounds. While less is publicly written about Ryan’s personal background, the site description portrays both founders as *“highly successful, smart, and experienced in the tech and education space.”* ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=experiencing%20a%20massive%20amount%20of,style%20search%20and%20answering%20usage)), implying that Ryan likely has a strong technical role (possibly leading the product or engineering side) that complements Esan’s strategic vision.

Together, Trattner and Durrani have driven StudyFetch’s rapid growth and innovation. Their combined focus on **educational impact** and **ethical AI use** comes through in the company’s mission and product decisions. By identifying a gap in student support and leveraging AI to fill it, the founders’ contributions lie in conceptualizing an AI platform that is **student-centric, teacher-friendly, and safe** for widespread adoption.

## Mission  
StudyFetch’s mission is rooted in the belief that **every student deserves an opportunity to succeed**. The platform was created to leverage advanced AI in order to **level the playing field** in education and make learning more effective for all. Key elements of the mission include: 

- **Universal Access to Personalized Learning** – StudyFetch aims to provide *“personalized, cutting edge technology to every student we can for as long as we can”* ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=At%20StudyFetch%2C%20we%20have%20built,deserves%20an%20opportunity%20to%20succeed)). This means using AI to tailor study tools to each learner’s needs and learning style, and ensuring this technology isn’t just for the privileged few. The team actively works to bridge educational gaps by offering low-cost or free solutions whenever possible so that students from under-resourced backgrounds can benefit ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=We%20will%20provide%20access%20to,to%20bridge%20the%20educational%20gaps)) ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=A%20student%27s%20background%2C%20school%20district,to%20a%20personalized%20learning%20experience)).  
- **Adapting to How Students Learn Best** – The mission statement emphasizes setting *“the standard for industry innovation with a platform that adapts to every student and how they learn best.”* ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=we%20can%20for%20as%20long,to%20bridge%20the%20educational%20gaps)) StudyFetch is built to accommodate different learning preferences (visual, auditory, etc.) and pace, which aligns with the founders’ recognition that traditional one-size-fits-all studying doesn’t work for everyone. This is evident in features like multiple content formats (text, audio, video) and Spark.E’s ability to adjust responses to the user.  
- **Empowering Teachers and Saving Time** – Although student success is at the core, StudyFetch also acknowledges that *“a teacher’s time is more precious than gold.”* One of the company’s principles is to create time for teachers to teach ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=There%20is%20no%20substitute%20for,time%20for%20teachers%20to%20teach)). By automating tasks like generating quizzes or summarizing lectures, the mission supports educators in focusing on what they do best (teaching and mentoring) while the AI handles repetitive prep work. This mission to assist (not replace) teachers is repeatedly highlighted.  
- **Safety and Integrity** – *“We will protect every student and every teacher with an accurate, appropriate and always secure experience.”* ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=every%20student%20and%20how%20they,learn%20best)) is a direct line from the mission statement. This underscores that any innovation by StudyFetch will not compromise on accuracy or security. It’s part of their vision to be a trustworthy tool that upholds academic integrity and keeps user data safe. In short, the mission combines **innovation in AI** with **responsibility in education**, aiming to *“transform education for the better”* while maintaining the values of privacy, safety, and equity.

The founders sum it up well with the motto: **“Because Every Student Matters.”** ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=We%20will%20protect%20every%20student,appropriate%20and%20always%20secure%20experience)) This phrase encapsulates why StudyFetch exists – to give each learner the resources and support they need to excel, using AI as a means to that end.

## Safety and Principles  
Trust and safety are paramount in StudyFetch’s design, given it targets students and educational settings. The platform is built on a strong ethical foundation and a set of principles to ensure it is used responsibly:

- **Privacy & Data Security** – StudyFetch prioritizes user privacy, especially for minors. The enterprise version complies with **COPPA** (Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act) and **FERPA** (Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act) requirements ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=A%20Leader%20in%20AI%20Safety)), reflecting its commitment to legal standards in education. All student and teacher data is safeguarded with state-of-the-art security and encryption ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=When%20it%20comes%20to%20AI%2C,the%20platform%20safe%20and%20trustworthy)). In practice, this means personal information and uploaded materials are kept confidential, and the system is engineered to prevent data leaks or unauthorized access. The company even has a **Trust Center** ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20COPPA%20Compliance%20%2045Image%3A,FERPA%20Compliance)) providing transparency on how data is handled.  
- **Academic Integrity** – A core principle for StudyFetch is *“Fostering Genuine Learning”* ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=5)). The AI is **not** meant to do students’ work for them dishonestly, but to guide them to understanding. To enforce this, StudyFetch incorporates **guardrails against cheating**. For instance, it has a tool that can detect if content (like an essay or answer) was generated by StudyFetch on a particular account, with logging and timestamps for educators ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Prevent%20Cheating)). This allows teachers to verify that students aren’t misusing the AI to generate work outside allowed parameters. All content and answers provided by the AI tutor are designed to require the student’s engagement (the AI might walk through a solution step-by-step rather than just handing over the final answer). By discouraging simply copying answers, it promotes honest learning.  
- **Accuracy and Low Hallucination** – StudyFetch holds itself to high standards of accuracy in the AI’s responses. The system is built with multiple AI models and a focus on **extremely low hallucination rates** ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Accuracy%20Icon)). In testing, it has demonstrated accuracy even on very large documents (150k+ words) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Accuracy%20Icon)). The platform uses **strict guardrails** and validation, especially for factual queries, to ensure students aren’t misled by incorrect information. If there’s uncertainty, the AI will err on the side of caution or ask the student for clarification. This commitment to factual reliability is part of maintaining trust – both students and educators need confidence that they can rely on StudyFetch’s answers ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=At%20StudyFetch%2C%20we%20believe%20artificial,standards%20of%20ethics%20and%20responsibility)) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Commitment%20to%20Accuracy)).  
- **Bias and Inclusivity** – One of StudyFetch’s eleven guiding principles is being **Unbiased and Inclusive** ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Unbiased%20and%20Inclusive)). The AI has been engineered to avoid cultural or gender biases in its responses, striving to give equal support to all learners. The content it generates is reviewed to ensure it’s appropriate for diverse audiences. Moreover, StudyFetch is committed to **Accessibility for All** – making sure students with disabilities can use the platform (through features like screen reader compatibility, etc.) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=9)). This principle of inclusivity also extends to the platform’s availability to students from different socio-economic backgrounds (e.g., offering free or low-cost access in certain cases) ([StudyFetch Mission Statement](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/mission#:~:text=A%20student%27s%20background%2C%20school%20district,to%20a%20personalized%20learning%20experience)).  
- **Safety Filters** – All interactions on StudyFetch are monitored by filters to maintain an **age-appropriate and safe learning space** ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Safe%20and%20Age)). This means the AI will refuse or filter out requests that are not related to learning or that ask for inappropriate content. For example, if a student tried to get the AI to do something against school rules, the AI is designed to either not comply or respond with a clarification. The platform aligns its usage with each institution’s code of conduct ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=11)), meaning it can be configured to respect specific school policies.  
- **Transparency and Principles** – StudyFetch openly publishes its guiding principles (11 in total) which cover the points above and more ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=At%20StudyFetch%2C%20we%20believe%20artificial,standards%20of%20ethics%20and%20responsibility)) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Safe%20and%20Age)). These include complementing (not replacing) teachers, maintaining accuracy, protecting privacy, encouraging real learning, ensuring equity, respecting intellectual property of educators (e.g., not misusing the content teachers upload) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=8)), and working closely with schools. By adhering to these principles, StudyFetch seeks to be an ethical player in the ed-tech AI space. The emphasis is on **empowerment over replacement** – the AI is a tutor *assistant*, not a teacher, and it’s meant to enhance the learning process rather than shortcut it ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=At%20StudyFetch%2C%20we%20believe%20artificial,standards%20of%20ethics%20and%20responsibility)) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Complementing%20Classroom%20Instruction)).

In summary, safety and ethical use are baked into StudyFetch’s platform. Through compliance with privacy laws, technical guardrails, and a clear philosophy of supporting genuine education, StudyFetch strives to be a *trusted* AI tool for students, parents, and educators alike.

## Keywords  
To sum up, the terms and topics most closely associated with StudyFetch include: 

- **AI Tutor** (Spark.E) – personalized AI-driven tutoring ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Quizzes%20AI%20Create%20and%20practice,quizzes%20from%20your%20course%20material))  
- **AI Learning Platform** – an ed-tech platform using artificial intelligence ([Microsoft Azure Marketplace](https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/es-es/marketplace/apps/studyfetch.bee26d0c-e072-4c87-8fa8-1bb0081bdd1a?tab=overview#:~:text=The%20all,platform%20in%20Education))  
- **EdTech / Education Technology** – innovative tech in learning ([Microsoft Azure Marketplace](https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/es-es/marketplace/apps/studyfetch.bee26d0c-e072-4c87-8fa8-1bb0081bdd1a?tab=overview#:~:text=The%20all,platform%20in%20Education))  
- **Personalized Learning** – adaptive study materials tailored to each student ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%20recognized%20that%20solving%20this,while%20providing%20instant%2C%20personalized%20support))  
- **Interactive Study Tools** – flashcards, quizzes, notes, and games generated from course content ([Our Blog | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog#:~:text=The%20Benefits%20of%20StudyFetch%3A%20An,Posted%20on%209%2F13%2F2023))  
- **Flashcards & Quizzes** – automated flashcard creation and quiz generation ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=Notes%20AI%20Create%20notes%20from,your%20course%20material%20in%20seconds))  
- **Study Sets** – comprehensive sets of study materials (notes, Q&A, etc.) from one’s uploads ([StudyFetch | The Top AI Learning Platform](https://www.studyfetch.com/#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20a%20revolutionary%20new,take%20practice%20tests%2C%20and%20more))  
- **Academic Integrity** – anti-cheating, honest learning, AI guardrails ([StudyFetch: The Ultimate Back-to-School Toolkit for Academic Success - LA Weekly](https://www.laweekly.com/studyfetch-the-ultimate-back-to-school-toolkit-for-academic-success/#:~:text=When%20it%20comes%20to%20AI%2C,the%20platform%20safe%20and%20trustworthy)) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=Image%3A%20Prevent%20Cheating))  
- **Canvas & LMS Integration** – integration with Canvas, Brightspace, and other LMS platforms ([StudyFetch Partners with Canvas by Instructure - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-canvas-by-instructure#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20proud%20to%20partner,with%20Canvas%20by%20Instructure)) ([StudyFetch Partners with D2L Brightspace to Integrate AI Learning Tools with Brightspace - StudyFetch Blog](https://www.studyfetch.com/blog/studyfetch-partners-with-d2l-brightspace-to-integrate-ai-learning-tools-with-brightspace#:~:text=StudyFetch%20is%20happy%20to%20announce,makes%20the%20Brightspace%20learning%20platform))  
- **24/7 Learning Support** – on-demand help anytime, beyond classroom hours ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=Traditional%20study%20methods%2C%20built%20around,side%E2%80%94to%20answer%20any%20question%E2%80%94becomes%20critical))  
- **Notes Summarization** – turning lectures and documents into summarized notes ([Notes AI | StudyFetch | The Best AI tools for Learning |  StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/en/features/notes#:~:text=Detailed%20Notes))  
- **AI in Education** – use of AI technologies (like Anthropic Claude) in educational contexts ([StudyFetch Powers Global AI Learning with Claude: Transforming Education for Millions \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/customers/studyfetch#:~:text=StudyFetch%20uses%20Claude%20to%20transform,support%20in%20over%2020%20languages))  
- **Student Engagement** – gamified, fun learning experience (Spark.E as a gamified tutor) ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=StudyFetch%20makes%20learning%20fun))  
- **Safe AI** – COPPA/FERPA compliance, privacy-focused design ([AI for Educational Institutions | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/institution#:~:text=A%20Leader%20in%20AI%20Safety)) ([Our Principles | StudyFetch](https://www.studyfetch.com/enterprise/principles#:~:text=Prioritizing%20Privacy))  

These keywords reflect StudyFetch’s core identity as an AI-powered educational tool, emphasizing its capabilities (like AI tutor, flashcards/quizzes), its unique selling points (personalization, integration, 24/7 support), and its commitment to safe, effective learning (academic integrity, privacy, ed-tech leadership). Each term is a facet of how StudyFetch is described in literature and by its users.

# StudyFetch Documentation Directory

## Tutorials

### Core Features

- **[Full Tutorial](https://studyfetch.com/docs/full-tutorial)** - Comprehensive walkthrough of all StudyFetch features in one video.
- **[Creating Study Sets](https://studyfetch.com/docs/creatingstudysets)** - Learn how to create and organize your study materials for optimal learning.
- **[Notes](https://studyfetch.com/docs/notes)** - Generate AI-powered notes from your course materials automatically.
- **[Flashcards](https://studyfetch.com/docs/flashcards)** - Create customized flashcards to memorize key concepts efficiently.
- **[Test](https://studyfetch.com/docs/test)** - Generate practice tests based on your study materials to assess your knowledge.
- **[QuizFetch](https://studyfetch.com/docs/quizfetch)** - Take interactive quizzes with confidence ratings to identify knowledge gaps.
- **[Audio Recap](https://studyfetch.com/docs/audiorecap)** - Convert your study materials into audio summaries for learning on the go.

### AI Features

- **[Tutor Me](https://studyfetch.com/docs/tutorme)** - Get personalized AI tutoring on any topic from your study materials.
- **[Chat Feature](https://studyfetch.com/docs/chatfeature)** - Interact with Spark.E AI to get answers about your study content.
- **[Explainers](https://studyfetch.com/docs/explainers)** - Create video explanations of complex topics from your materials.
- **[Essay Grading](https://studyfetch.com/docs/essaygrading)** - Get instant feedback and suggestions on your written assignments.

### Organization Tools

- **[Creating Folders](https://studyfetch.com/docs/creatingfolders)** - Organize your study sets into folders for better management.
- **[Calendar](https://studyfetch.com/docs/calendar)** - Schedule and plan your study sessions with AI-powered suggestions.
- **[Live Lecture](https://studyfetch.com/docs/livelecture)** - Record and transcribe lectures automatically while taking notes.

### Imagine Explainers

- **[Imagine Explainers](https://studyfetch.com/docs/ImaginExplainers)** - Create animated video explanations of any concept with AI technology.

## Support

### Account Management

- **[Contact Support](https://studyfetch.com/docs/contactsupport)** - How to reach StudyFetch support for different types of assistance.
- **[Account Login & Management](https://studyfetch.com/docs/accountlogin-management)** - Manage your StudyFetch account settings and login information.
- **[Account Recovery & Password Reset](https://studyfetch.com/docs/accountrecovery-passwordreset)** - Steps to recover access to your account or reset your password.
- **[Deleting Account](https://studyfetch.com/docs/deletingaccount)** - Instructions for permanently removing your StudyFetch account.
- **[Logout](https://studyfetch.com/docs/logout)** - How to securely sign out of your StudyFetch account.

### User Settings

- **[Change Language](https://studyfetch.com/docs/changelanguage)** - Instructions for changing the interface language in StudyFetch.
- **[Marketing Emails](https://studyfetch.com/docs/marketingemails)** - Manage your marketing email preferences and notifications.
- **[Unsubscribe](https://studyfetch.com/docs/unsubscribe)** - How to unsubscribe from StudyFetch emails and communications.
- **[Print Notes](https://studyfetch.com/docs/printnotes)** - Instructions for printing your study notes for physical review.
- **[Refund Policy](https://studyfetch.com/docs/refund-policy)** - Details about StudyFetch's refund policy and eligibility criteria.
